reply: Se consolidaron 500 saldos de materiales por tecnico y codigo en operacion_hfc. El resultado conserva el detalle por cedula y codigo

insights: Cada fila muestra codigo, descripcion, tipo, cedula, empleado, movil, entregas, devoluciones, consumos, cobros y saldo.
No se devolvio un saldo agregado por empleado o cuadrilla; el saldo operativo se conserva por codigo.
Revisa primero codigos con saldo negativo, cero o movimientos atipicos para priorizar control operativo.

business_response_composer.que_entendi: Entendí una consulta del dominio inventario logistica con intención inventory stock by mobile
business_response_composer.datos_usados: Datos usados: base_codigos, logistica_movimientos_entrega, logistica_movimientos_consumo, logistica_movimientos_cobro. Filtros aplicados: bodega
business_response_composer.resultado: Se consolidaron 500 saldos de materiales por tecnico y codigo en operacion_hfc. El resultado conserva el detalle por cedula y codigo

query_intelligence.query: SELECT mov.codigo AS codigo, COALESCE(MAX(cat.descripcion), '') AS descripcion, COALESCE(MAX(cat.tipo), '') AS tipo, mov.cedula AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(emp.nombre), '') AS nombre, TRIM(CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(emp.nombre), ' ', 1), CASE WHEN TRIM(emp.apellido) = '' THEN '' ELSE CONCAT(' ', SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(emp.apellido), ' ', 1)) END)) AS empleado, COALESCE(MAX(emp.movil), '') AS movil, SUM(mov.entregas) AS entregas, SUM(mov.devoluciones) AS devoluciones, SUM(mov.consumos) AS consumos, SUM(mov.cobros) AS cobros, SUM(mov.entregas - mov.devoluciones - mov.consumos - mov.cobros) AS saldo, SUM(mov.registros_cantidad_invalida) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM (SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_entrega WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_cobro WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_devolucion WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula) AS mov LEFT JOIN (SELECT p.cedula AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(p.movil), '') AS movil, COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '') AS nombre, COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '') AS apellido FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p GROUP BY p.cedula) AS emp ON emp.cedula = mov.cedula LEFT JOIN base_codigos AS cat ON cat.codigo = mov.codigo GROUP BY mov.codigo, mov.cedula, COALESCE(emp.movil, '') HAVING saldo <> 0 OR registros_cantidad_invalida > 0 ORDER BY movil ASC, mov.cedula ASC, mov.codigo ASC LIMIT 500

warnings: La consulta pide un saldo por técnico con campos de identificación y total de materiales. En la metadata disponible no hay una capacidad exacta de saldo/stock por técnico, por lo que se interpreta prudentemente como una agregación por personal técnico asociado a operacion_hfc, mo

TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, devoluciones, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_cobro WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_devolucion WHERE bodega = 'operacion_hfc' GROUP BY codigo, cedula) AS mov LEFT JOIN (SELECT p.cedula AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(p.movil), '') AS movil, COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '') AS nombre, COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '') AS apellido FROM bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p GROUP BY p.cedula) AS emp ON emp.cedula = mov.cedula LEFT JOIN base_codigos AS cat ON cat.codigo = mov.codigo GROUP BY mov.codigo, mov.cedula, COALESCE(emp.movil, '') HAVING saldo <> 0 OR registros_cantidad_invalida > 0 ORDER BY movil ASC, mov.cedula ASC, mov.codigo ASC LIMIT 500
recommendations: Explorar el mismo analisis por sede, area, cargo o fecha.
Cada fila muestra codigo, descripcion, tipo, cedula, empleado, movil, entregas, devoluciones, consumos, cobros y saldo.
No se devolvio un saldo agregado por empleado o cuadrilla; el saldo operativo se conserva por codigo.
